description: Email management: search, read, send, draft, label, archive, and manage Gmail messages

name: gmail_search
description: Search Gmail messages using Gmail query syntax (e.g., 'from:user@example.com', 'is:unread', 'subject:hello'). Returns message list with id, snippet, from, subject, date. When the user asks to check, look at, or go through their Gmail without specifying a folder, default to query 'in:inbox'.

query.description: Gmail search query (same syntax as Gmail search bar)

max_results.description: Maximum number of results to return (default: 20, max: 100)

name: gmail_get_message
description: Get the full content of a specific Gmail message by ID. Returns subject, from, to, cc, date, body text, labels, and attachment info.

name: gmail_send
description: Send a new email. Supports plain text and HTML body. Returns the sent message ID and thread ID.

to.description: Recipient email address(es), comma-separated for multiple

html.description: If true, body is treated as HTML. Default: false

name: gmail_reply
description: Reply to an existing Gmail message thread. Returns the sent message ID.

message_id.description: The Gmail message ID to reply to

html.description: If true, body is treated as HTML. Default: false

name: gmail_trash
description: Move one or more Gmail messages to Trash. Pass a single message_id string or an array of message_ids for batch trash.

message_id.description: A single Gmail message ID to trash (for backwards compatibility)

message_ids.description: Array of Gmail message IDs to trash (for batch operations)

name: gmail_untrash
description: Remove a Gmail message from Trash.

message_id.description: The Gmail message ID to remove from trash

name: gmail_mark_read
description: Mark a Gmail message as read by removing the UNREAD label.

message_id.description: The Gmail message ID to mark as read

name: gmail_mark_unread
description: Mark a Gmail message as unread by adding the UNREAD label.

message_id.description: The Gmail message ID to mark as unread

name: gmail_add_label
description: Add a label to a Gmail message.

label_id.description: The label ID to add (use gmail_list_labels to get label IDs)

name: gmail_remove_label
description: Remove a label from a Gmail message.

name: gmail_list_labels
description: List all Gmail labels for the user's account.

name: gmail_create_label
description: Create a new Gmail label.

name: gmail_create_draft
description: Create a Gmail draft message without sending it.

html.description: If true, body is treated as HTML

name: gmail_list_drafts
description: List Gmail draft messages.

max_results.description: Maximum number of drafts to return (default: 20)

name: gmail_send_draft
description: Send an existing Gmail draft.

name: gmail_get_attachment
description: Get the content of a Gmail message attachment, saved to a file.

save_path.description: Local file path to save the attachment

name: gmail_list_threads
description: List Gmail threads (conversations) matching a query.

max_results.description: Maximum number of threads to return (default: 20)

name: gmail_get_thread
description: Get all messages in a Gmail thread.

name: gmail_modify_labels
description: Add and/or remove labels on a Gmail message or thread. Accepts label names or IDs.

message_id.description: Gmail message ID (provide message_id or thread_id, not both)

thread_id.description: Gmail thread ID (provide message_id or thread_id, not both)

add_labels.description: Label names or IDs to add

remove_labels.description: Label names or IDs to remove

name: gmail_delete_label
description: Permanently delete a Gmail label by ID. Built-in system labels cannot be deleted.

label_id.description: The label ID to delete (use gmail_list_labels to find IDs)

name: gmail_get_draft
description: Get the full content of a specific Gmail draft by ID. Returns subject, to, body, and other headers.

name: gmail_delete_draft
description: Permanently delete a Gmail draft.

draft_id.description: The Gmail draft ID to delete

name: gmail_history
description: List Gmail history records (changes) since a given history ID. Returns messages added, deleted, and label changes.

start_history_id.description: The history ID to start listing from (obtain from a message's historyId field)

max_results.description: Maximum number of history records to return (default: 50)

label_id.description: Only return history for this label ID (optional)

name: gmail_batch_modify
description: Batch modify labels on multiple Gmail messages at once. Accepts label names or IDs.

message_ids.description: Array of Gmail message IDs to modify

add_labels.description: Label names or IDs to add to all messages

remove_labels.description: Label names or IDs to remove from all messages
